text:
Created attachment 172154
Proposed patch (since 417685 revision)

Patch to unbreak devel/omake port.

The distfile is fetchable from following mirror:
% curl -sLI http://download.camlcity.org/download/omake-0.9.8.6-0.rc1.tar.gz
HTTP/1.1 200 OK

Last-Modified: Sun, 20 Sep 2015 14:00:00 GMT

There are many mirrors available on following links:
http://www.filewatcher.com/m/omake-0.9.8.6-0.rc1.tar.gz.3254283-0.html
https://opam.ocaml.org/packages/omake/omake.0.9.8.6-0.rc1/

Also possible to restore following dependent ports, removed in ports r418101:
games/freetennis
graphics/ocaml-images
